---
title: "Winter Week 10"
---

## Materials

📕  [Class slides]({{< var winter-week10-class-slides >}})

🗂️ [GiHub Organizations List]({{< var github-organizations-urls-spreadsheet  >}})

🌱 [UCSB course survey](https://ucsb.bluera.com/ucsb)

💭 [In-class Team Reflections]({{< var team-reflections-411A >}})

📖 [Capstone Guidelines]({{< var capstone-guidelines >}})

## Schedule
12:30 - 12:40: Check-in

12:40 - 1:20 Winter quarter retrospective team meetings

1:20 - 1:25 : Course recap and looking forward

1:25 - 1:50 : Getting organized for next quarter

1:50 - 1:55 Remaining assignments

1:55 - 2:05 : BREAK & Surveys 

2:05 - 3:25:Independent group work

3:25 - 3:30: Team reflections

## Upcoming Capstone Deadlines
![](/411a_winter/images/411a_deadlines5.png)


## Remaining assignments


### 1. 📥 Submit Final Design and Implementation Plan

**Due when?** Submit by {{< var winter-deliverables-final-date >}} at 5 PM.

**How to submit:** 

1. Upload **PDF file** to [shared Google folder]({{< var final-dips-folder >}}). Use the filename `YourGroupAlias_DIP.pdf`.

2. Email this PDF to your faculty advisor and client as well.

<details>
<summary>**Instructions**</summary>

- Finalize any updates for the DIP. This final version must include any changes you have made based on feedback from faculty reviews. 
- When you email your DIP to your faculty advisor and client: be professional and thank them for their involvement.

</summary>

<br>

### 2. 📥 Submit Peer/Self Evaluation

**Due when?** Submit by {{< var winter-deliverables-final-date >}} at 5 PM.

**How to submit:** 

1. Use the following file name: `YourGroupAlias_Firstname_Lastname_411ASelfPeerEvaluation.pdf`.
2. Upload the documents **as PDFs** to [this Box folder]({{< var final-peer-and-self-evaluation-box-folder-411A >}}).
3. Email your evaluation directly to your advisor as well.

<details>
<summary>**Instructions**</summary>

Please complete the following document: [[TEMPLATE] Peer and Self Evaluation - 411A Final]({{< var peer-and-self-evaluation-endofquarter >}}). Detailed instructions are included in the template.

This is an individual assignment and is required to pass the 411A course. Each person is responsible for submitting their own reflection and submitting it to the Box folder.

</summary>


<br>

### 3. 💫 Finish getting ready for next quarter

Make sure your team has finished discussing questions in the [“Get ready for next quarter” slide]({{< var winter-week10-class-slides >}}) before the end of the week. 


<br>

### 4. 🌱 Fill out UCSB course survey

Please fill out the UCSB course survey  (10 minutes): [https://ucsb.bluera.com/ucsb](https://ucsb.bluera.com/ucsb)

<br>
<br>

![](/411a_winter/images/spring_break.png)
